title: Senior Doctor - Bombay Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Bombay Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!
